Operation 'getAppsInSpace' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. data.current_description: Get all apps in a space
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all apps available in a specified space. Returns a list of App objects containing app metadata, configuration, and status information. Requires the space_id parameter to identify the target space. Useful for discovering available work management applications and their configurations within a workspace.
data.reasoning: The current description is minimal and lacks important details about what is returned and the context of use. The suggestion clarifies the return structure (list of App objects), explains the purpose in domain context (discovering available applications), and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'addApp' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks specificity about inputs (AppCreate schema details), outputs (what App object contains), and side effects (app becomes available for use). The suggestion provides comprehensive details about request/response structures, the domain action being performed, and helps AI agents understand the full lifecycle impact of creating an app.

data.current_description: Create a new app in a space
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new app in the specified space. Accepts an AppCreate request body containing the app configuration (name, description, and field definitions). Returns the newly created App object with assigned app_id and metadata. This operation adds a new work management application to the workspace and makes it available for item creation and workflow automation. Requires the space_id parameter to identify the target space.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks specificity about inputs (AppCreate schema details), outputs (what App object contains), and side effects (app becomes available for use). The suggestion provides comprehensive details about request/response structures, the domain action being performed, and helps AI agents understand the full lifecycle impact of creating an app.

message: Operation 'getToken' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical details about required inputs (credentials/refresh token), response structure (TokenResponse schema), and how to use the returned token. Added specifics about authentication requirements, return value details, and usage instructions for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Obtain or refresh an OAuth2 access token
data.summary_suggestion: Obtain or refresh OAuth2 access token
data.description_suggestion: Obtain a new OAuth2 access token or refresh an existing one for API authentication. Requires client credentials (client_id and client_secret) or a refresh token. Returns a TokenResponse object containing the access token, token type, expiration time, and optional refresh token. The returned token should be used in subsequent API requests via the Authorization header.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about required inputs (credentials/refresh token), response structure (TokenResponse schema), and how to use the returned token. Added specifics about authentication requirements, return value details, and usage instructions for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'addItem' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too brief and lacks details about the request schema structure, what is returned, and side effects (automatic timestamp assignment). Enhanced to clarify input expectations, response structure, and system behavior for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Create a new item in an app
data.description_suggestion: Create a new item in the specified app using the ItemCreate schema. The item is added to the app identified by app_id and becomes immediately available for querying and filtering. Returns the created Item object with a unique item_id and all provided field values. The item's creation timestamp is automatically set by the system.
data.reasoning: Description is too brief and lacks details about the request schema structure, what is returned, and side effects (automatic timestamp assignment). Enhanced to clarify input expectations, response structure, and system behavior for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'updateItem' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks specificity about the update mechanism (partial vs. full), what is returned, and system behavior. Added clarity about partial update support, response structure, and automatic timestamp updates to improve AI agent understanding of update semantics.

data.description_suggestion: Update an existing item identified by item_id using the ItemUpdate schema. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified while existing values remain unchanged. Returns the updated Item object reflecting all changes. The item's modification timestamp is automatically updated by the system.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about the update mechanism (partial vs. full), what is returned, and system behavior. Added clarity about partial update support, response structure, and automatic timestamp updates to improve AI agent understanding of update semantics.

message: Operation 'deleteItem' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too minimal and lacks critical information about permanence, side effects (data removal), and response format. Added details about irreversibility, cascading effects, and response structure to help AI agents understand the destructive nature and consequences of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently delete an item identified by item_id. The item is removed from the app and becomes inaccessible. This action cannot be undone. Returns a success response (typically 204 No Content or a confirmation message). All associated data and relationships with this item are also removed.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal and lacks critical information about permanence, side effects (data removal), and response format. Added details about irreversibility, cascading effects, and response structure to help AI agents understand the destructive nature and consequences of this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Filter items in app by criteria
data.description_suggestion: Filter and retrieve items from the specified app based on query criteria. Accepts filter conditions via the request body to match items by field values, date ranges, or other criteria. Returns a paginated list of Item objects matching the filter conditions. Supports sorting and pagination parameters for result control.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic. Enhanced summary to indicate filtering by criteria. Expanded description to clarify that filtering uses request body criteria, explain the paginated response format, and mention sorting/pagination support. This helps AI agents understand the operation's filtering capabilities and response structure.
